---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots.
